metadata.description: Local MemWeave plugin marketplace (mavis-plugin + codex-plugin, both CC marketplace format).

plugins.name: memweave

plugins.name: memweave-codex
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex plugin for MemWeave. 10 memory_* MCP tools + 3 hooks (UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, Stop).
